targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount>0 AND COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Income FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND booked_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y-%m-01') AND booked_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

SELECT ROUND(-SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount<0 AND COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Spending FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND booked_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y-%m-01') AND booked_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Free FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND booked_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y-%m-01') AND booked_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

panels.title: Income vs Spending vs Free — per month

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount>0 AND COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Income, ROUND(-SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount<0 AND COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Spending, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Free FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t AS time, ROUND(SUM(net) OVER (ORDER BY t),2) AS `Cumulative net` FROM (SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') t, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(category,'')<>'transfer' THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END) net FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1) x ORDER BY t

SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount>0 THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS `From savings (in)`, ROUND(-SUM(CASE WHEN base_amount<0 THEN base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS `To savings (out)` FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND COALESCE(category,'')='transfer' AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Spending by category — per month (top 10, stacked)

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, COALESCE(top.category,'other') AS metric, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS value FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug LEFT JOIN (SELECT category FROM transactions WHERE account_id='ing-checking' AND base_amount<0 AND booked_date>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 13 MONTH) GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(base_amount) ASC LIMIT 10) top ON top.category=t.category WHERE c.kind='expense' AND t.account_id='ing-checking' AND $__timeFilter(t.booked_date) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t.category AS Category, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS Spend, COUNT(*) AS Txns FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE c.kind='expense' AND t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.booked_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15
